title: David Forthoffer
text: Home * People * David Forthoffer David Forthoffer [1] David Forthoffer , an American computer scientist, chess player, national master [2] , and early Endgame Tablebases researcher. Along with primary author Sito Dekker and Lars Rasmussen he contributed to the automated database generation program Retro , considering both en passant and castling [3] , which revealed five discrepancies in KRKB [4] from the numbers published by Jaap van den Herik and Bob Herschberg , et al. [5] . Contents 1 Selected Publications 2 Forum Posts 3 External Links 4 References Selected Publications [ edit ] [6] David Forthoffer , Lars Rasmussen , Sito Dekker ( 1989 ). A Correction to some KRKB-Database Results .
